changelog: Added stronger account filtering and project currency handling across accounting flows.
Improved UI responsiveness and keyboard shortcuts in managers, dialogs, and dashboard navigation.
Refined notification, settings, export, and template services for safer runtime behavior and PDF output.
Expanded automated test coverage for startup, services, data linking, and UI smoke interactions.
Built and verified a fresh Windows executable and installer package for this release.
notes_ar: هذا التحديث يحسن إدارة الدفعات وربطها بالفواتير والمشاريع، ويصقل واجهات الإشعارات ولوحة التحكم مع تجهيز مثبت جديد قابل للتثبيت.
notes_en: This update improves payment-to-project and invoice tracking, refines notification and dashboard UI, and ships a freshly verified Windows installer.
